title: Not Enough Flowers
description: A simple mod that adds more flowers for your builds!
body: ![Not Enough Flowers header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/146f66cb79492d2737547d467380e29c5d47a876.png) This mod is part of the "Not Enough" series, being a new mod which adds 38 new flowers and 2 new foods! And on top of that adds a rare-occuring biome, over 100 new potions made from these flowers, and new ways to craft the dyes of Minecraft! The 38 new flowers! ![The 38 new flowers added from this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57d40646e87661d6eb1c27c22cd879305c539d1b.jpeg) The 2 new foods, the Reverence Berry and the Reverence Stem! ![Two new foods inspired from Sweet Berries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb53f60cd9a934e1dc14d3ddad13d48fc09cd7bb.jpeg) ### All textures from this mod have been made by [8bitgunner](https://x.com/8bitgunner)
